name: Notion
tagline: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, and projects
description: Notion is a flexible workspace that combines notes, wikis, databases, and project management in one tool. Popular with startups, solopreneurs, and teams who want a customisable, connected workspace.
cons: Can be overwhelming for new users
use_cases: Your team needs a single workspace that combines internal wiki, meeting notes, project tracking, and company documentation
You're a startup or solopreneur who wants a flexible, database-driven workspace you can shape exactly to your workflow
Your team creates a lot of linked documents and wants pages, databases, and project boards to reference each other seamlessly
You want to replace scattered tools — Google Docs for notes, Trello for tasks, Confluence for docs — with one connected system
